chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4272 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.08.2025 Mr. Fahad Akbar, advocate for NBP. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 08.03.2024, which is almost 11⁄2 year ago. In the last 11⁄2 year, learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
